import requests
from lxml import etree
import time
import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urljoin

# 配置项
LINK_FEATURE = "/SYrlzyhshbzb/fwyd/SYkaoshizhaopin/"
BASE_URL = "http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/cjobs/institution/listInstitution"
HEADERS = {
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
    "Referer": "http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/",
    "Accept": "text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/webp,*/*;q=0.8",
    "Accept-Language": "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8",
    "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest"
}

# 全局变量
JSONL_FILE = "事业单位招聘信息_完整数据.jsonl"
title_duplicate_set = set()  # 标题查重集合
current_auto_id = 1          # 自增ID计数器（核心：从1开始）

def load_existing_data():
    """加载历史数据：恢复标题查重集合 + 初始化自增ID"""
    global current_auto_id, title_duplicate_set
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            max_id = 0
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                for line in f:
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        data = json.loads(line)
                        # 1. 记录所有标题（查重）
                        if "title" in data:
                            title_duplicate_set.add(data["title"])
                        # 2. 找到最大ID，作为下一个ID的起始值
                        if "id" in data and isinstance(data["id"], int):
                            if data["id"] > max_id:
                                max_id = data["id"]
            # 自增ID从最大ID+1开始
            current_auto_id = max_id + 1
            print(f"✅ 加载历史数据完成")
            print(f"   - 历史不重复标题数：{len(title_duplicate_set)}")
            print(f"   - 下一个自增ID：{current_auto_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 加载历史数据失败：{e}，将从ID=1开始重新爬取")
            current_auto_id = 1
            title_duplicate_set = set()
    else:
        print(f"ℹ️ 无历史数据，从ID=1开始爬取")

def extract_page_data(html_text, page_num):
    """提取单页数据：自增ID + 标题查重"""
    global current_auto_id
    html = etree.HTML(html_text)
    
    all_a = html.xpath(f"//a[contains(@href, '{LINK_FEATURE}') and @class='aa_lan_2']")
    all_dates = html.xpath("//td[@class='zhaopin-title']/following-sibling::td[1]/text()")
    
    print(f"\n🔍 第{page_num}页：匹配到 {len(all_a)} 个链接，{len(all_dates)} 个时间")
    page_new_data = []
    page_count = 0
    
    for i in range(min(len(all_a), len(all_dates))):
        a_node = all_a[i]
        title = a_node.text.strip() if a_node.text else f"无标题_{page_num}_{i+1}"
        link = a_node.get("href", "").strip()
        publish_time = all_dates[i].strip()
        
        # 1. 标题查重：跳过重复内容
        if title in title_duplicate_set:
            print(f"⏭️ 跳过重复标题（ID={current_auto_id}）：{title[:30]}...")
            continue
        
        # 2. 数据校验
        if title and link and len(publish_time) == 10:
            news_item = {
                "id": current_auto_id,  # 自增ID（核心修改）
                "page": page_num,       # 保留页码（可选，便于溯源）
                "title": title,
                "link": link,
                "publish_time": publish_time
            }
            page_new_data.append(news_item)
            title_duplicate_set.add(title)
            current_auto_id += 1  # ID自增
            page_count += 1
    
    print(f"✅ 第{page_num}页：新增 {page_count} 条不重复数据（当前最大ID={current_auto_id-1}）")
    return page_new_data, len(all_a) > 0

def crawl_dynamic_pages():
    """模拟JS翻页爬取所有数据"""
    session = requests.Session()
    all_new_data = []
    current_page = 1
    has_next_page = True
    
    # 爬取第一页
    print(f"\n🚀 开始爬取第 {current_page} 页（初始页）")
    response = session.get(BASE_URL, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15, verify=False)
    response.encoding = "utf-8"
    page_data, has_data = extract_page_data(response.text, current_page)
    all_new_data.extend(page_data)
    
    # 循环爬取下一页
    while has_next_page and has_data:
        current_page += 1
        print(f"\n📝 模拟点击下一页，爬取第 {current_page} 页")
        next_page_url = f"{BASE_URL}?p={current_page}&pageSize=15"
        
        try:
            time.sleep(2)  # 模拟人类翻页延迟
            response = session.get(next_page_url, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15, verify=False)
            response.raise_for_status()
            response.encoding = "utf-8"
            
            page_data, has_data = extract_page_data(response.text, current_page)
            all_new_data.extend(page_data)
            
            # 无新数据则停止翻页
            if len(page_data) == 0:
                has_next_page = False
                print(f"📌 第{current_page}页无新数据，已爬取到最后一页")
                
            time.sleep(0.5)  # 随机小延迟
            
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"❌ 第{current_page}页爬取失败：{str(e)[:100]}")
            time.sleep(3)
            try:
                response = session.get(next_page_url, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15, verify=False)
                page_data, has_data = extract_page_data(response.text, current_page)
                all_new_data.extend(page_data)
            except:
                has_next_page = False
                print(f"📌 第{current_page}页重试失败，停止翻页")
    
    return all_new_data

def save_to_jsonl(new_data):
    """保存数据：合并历史+新增，保证ID连续且不重复"""
    # 1. 读取历史数据
    history_data = []
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                for line in f:
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        history_data.append(json.loads(line))
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 读取历史数据失败：{e}，将覆盖原有文件")
            history_data = []
    
    # 2. 合并数据（历史+新增）
    all_data = history_data + new_data
    
    # 3. 最终去重（按标题）+ 按ID排序
    unique_data = []
    unique_titles = set()
    for item in all_data:
        if item["title"] not in unique_titles:
            unique_titles.add(item["title"])
            unique_data.append(item)
    # 按ID升序排列，保证顺序一致
    unique_data.sort(key=lambda x: x["id"])
    
    # 4. 写入文件
    try:
        with open(JSONL_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            for item in unique_data:
                json_line = json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.write(json_line + "\n")
        
        print(f"\n📄 JSONL文件保存成功！")
        print(f"📁 文件路径：{os.path.abspath(JSONL_FILE)}")
        print(f"📈 总计数据：{len(unique_data)} 条（ID范围：1~{unique_data[-1]['id']}）")
        print(f"🔍 本次新增：{len(new_data)} 条")
    except PermissionError:
        print(f"\n❌ 权限不足！请关闭打开的 {JSONL_FILE} 文件后重试")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n❌ 保存失败：{str(e)}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("🚀 开始爬取事业单位招聘信息（自增ID+全局查重+动态翻页）")
    # 步骤1：加载历史数据，初始化自增ID
    load_existing_data()
    # 步骤2：动态翻页爬取新数据
    new_data = crawl_dynamic_pages()
    # 步骤3：保存数据（合并历史+新增）
    save_to_jsonl(new_data)
    print("\n🎉 爬取任务全部完成！")

            time.sleep(0.1)

        # 保存为CSV
        with open("事业单位招聘信息.csv", "w", encoding="utf-8-sig", newline="") as f:
            writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["title", "link", "publish_time"])
            writer.writeheader()
            writer.writerows(news_list)
        print("📄 数据已保存为「事业单位招聘信息.csv」")

except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:

                print(f"📌 第{current_page}页重试失败，停止翻页")
    
    return all_new_data

def save_to_jsonl(new_data):
    """保存数据：合并历史+新增，保证ID连续且不重复"""
    # 1. 读取历史数据
    history_data = []
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                for line in f:
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        history_data.append(json.loads(line))
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 读取历史数据失败：{e}，将覆盖原有文件")
            history_data = []
    
    # 2. 合并数据（历史+新增）
    all_data = history_data + new_data
    
    # 3. 最终去重（按标题）+ 按ID排序
    unique_data = []
    unique_titles = set()
    for item in all_data:
        if item["title"] not in unique_titles:
            unique_titles.add(item["title"])
            unique_data.append(item)
    # 按ID升序排列，保证顺序一致
    unique_data.sort(key=lambda x: x["id"])
    
    # 4. 写入文件
    try:
        with open(JSONL_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            for item in unique_data:
                json_line = json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.write(json_line + "\n")
        
        print(f"\n📄 JSONL文件保存成功！")
        print(f"📁 文件路径：{os.path.abspath(JSONL_FILE)}")
        print(f"📈 总计数据：{len(unique_data)} 条（ID范围：1~{unique_data[-1]['id']}）")
        print(f"🔍 本次新增：{len(new_data)} 条")
    except PermissionError:
        print(f"\n❌ 权限不足！请关闭打开的 {JSONL_FILE} 文件后重试")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n❌ 保存失败：{str(e)}")

import json

# ========== 精准配置（针对新页面） ==========
EDGE_DRIVER_PATH = r"D:\Mine\Download\edge download\edgedriver_win64\msedgedriver.exe"
TARGET_URL = "http://job.mohrss.gov.cn/rdzx/index.jhtml"

# ================================================

# 全局变量（自增ID+查重）
title_duplicate_set = set()
current_auto_id = 1

def load_existing_data():
    """加载历史数据，初始化自增ID和查重集合"""
    global current_auto_id, title_duplicate_set
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            max_id = 0
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                for line in f:
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        data = json.loads(line)
                        if "title" in data:
                            title_duplicate_set.add(data["title"])
                        if "id" in data and isinstance(data["id"], int):
                            max_id = max(max_id, data["id"])
            current_auto_id = max_id + 1
            print(f"✅ 加载历史数据完成")
            print(f"   - 历史不重复标题数：{len(title_duplicate_set)}")
            print(f"   - 下一个自增ID：{current_auto_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 加载历史数据失败：{e}，将从ID=1重新开始")
            current_auto_id = 1
            title_duplicate_set = set()
    else:
        print(f"ℹ️ 无历史数据，ID从1开始爬取")

def init_edge_driver():
    """初始化Edge浏览器（可选无头模式）"""
    edge_options = Options()
    
    if HEADLESS_MODE:
        # 无头模式配置
        edge_options.add_argument("--headless=new")
        edge_options.add_argument("--disable-gpu")
        edge_options.add_argument("--window-size=1920,1080")
        edge_options.add_argument("--no-sandbox")
    else:
        # 有头模式（调试用）
        edge_options.add_argument("--start-maximized")
        edge_options.add_argument("--window-size=1920,1080")
    
    # 通用配置
    edge_options.add_argument("--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled")
    edge_options.add_experimental_option("excludeSwitches", ["enable-automation"])
    edge_options.add_experimental_option("useAutomationExtension", False)
    edge_options.add_argument("--log-level=3")
    
    # 初始化驱动
    service = Service(EDGE_DRIVER_PATH)
    driver = webdriver.Edge(service=service, options=edge_options)
    driver.execute_script("Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {get: () => undefined})")
    driver.implicitly_wait(10)
    return driver

def extract_news_from_page(driver, page_url=None, page_num=1):
    """从当前页面提取所有新闻数据"""
    global current_auto_id
    page_new_data = []
    
    if page_url:
        driver.get(page_url)
        time.sleep(2)
    
    # 等待页面加载完成
    WebDriverWait(driver, 15).until(
        EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CLASS_NAME, "blue-light"))
    )
    time.sleep(1)
    
    # 提取所有class="blue-light"的a标签
    news_links = driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "a.blue-light")
    
    print(f"\n🔍 第{page_num}页：找到 {len(news_links)} 条新闻链接")
    
    for i, link_element in enumerate(news_links):
        try:
            # 提取标题和链接
            title = link_element.text.strip()
            link = link_element.get_attribute("href").strip()
            
            # 过滤无效数据
            if not title or not link:
                continue
            
            # 标题查重
            if title in title_duplicate_set:
                print(f"⏭️ 跳过重复标题：{title[:30]}...")
                continue
            
            # 尝试提取发布时间（可能在父元素或相邻元素中）
            publish_time = extract_publish_time(link_element)
            
            # 组装数据
            news_item = {
                "id": current_auto_id,
                "page": page_num,
                "title": title,
                "link": link,
                "publish_time": publish_time,
                "source": "人社部热点资讯"
            }
            page_new_data.append(news_item)
            title_duplicate_set.add(title)
            print(f"✅ 第{page_num}页第{i+1}条：{title[:40]}... ({publish_time})")
            current_auto_id += 1
            
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 第{page_num}页第{i+1}条数据提取失败：{str(e)[:60]}")
            continue
    
    print(f"📊 第{page_num}页：新增 {len(page_new_data)} 条不重复数据")
    return page_new_data

def extract_publish_time(element):
    """提取发布时间（尝试多种策略）"""
    try:
        # 策略1：查找父元素中的时间标签
        parent = element.find_element(By.XPATH, "..")
        time_elements = parent.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "span.time, span.date, .date, .time")
        if time_elements:
            time_text = time_elements[0].text.strip()
            if time_text:
                # 提取日期格式（如：2025-03-26）
                date_match = re.search(r'\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}', time_text)
                if date_match:
                    return date_match.group()
        
        # 策略2：查找兄弟元素中的时间
        sibling_time = element.find_elements(By.XPATH, "following-sibling::*[contains(@class, 'time') or contains(@class, 'date')]")
        if sibling_time:
            time_text = sibling_time[0].text.strip()
            date_match = re.search(r'\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}', time_text)
            if date_match:
                return date_match.group()
        
        # 策略3：从页面URL或默认值
        return "时间未知"
        
    except Exception as e:
        return "时间未知"

def get_pagination_info(driver):
    """获取分页信息"""
    try:
        # 查找分页链接
        pagination = driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".page a, .pagination a")
        page_numbers = []
        for link in pagination:
            text = link.text.strip()
            if text.isdigit():
                page_numbers.append(int(text))
        
        if page_numbers:
            total_pages = max(page_numbers)
            print(f"📊 找到分页信息，总页数：{total_pages}")
            return total_pages
        
        # 查找"下一页"按钮来判断是否有更多页
        next_buttons = driver.find_elements(By.LINK_TEXT, "下一页")
        if next_buttons:
            # 有下一页，但不知道总页数，先返回一个较大的值
            return 10
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ 获取分页信息失败：{e}")
    
    # 默认只爬取第一页
    return 1

def click_next_page(driver, current_page):
    """点击下一页"""
    try:
        # 方法1：查找"下一页"链接
        next_links = driver.find_elements(By.LINK_TEXT, "下一页")
        if next_links:
            driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", next_links[0])
            time.sleep(2)
            print(f"✅ 点击下一页成功")
            return True
        
        # 方法2：查找带next类的元素
        next_buttons = driver.find_elements(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".next, .page-next")
        if next_buttons:
            driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", next_buttons[0])
            time.sleep(2)
            return True
            
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ 翻页失败：{e}")
    
    return False

def crawl_all_pages():
    """爬取所有页面的新闻"""
    driver = init_edge_driver()
    all_new_data = []
    
    try:
        # 访问首页
        print(f"\n🚀 开始爬取首页：{TARGET_URL}")
        driver.get(TARGET_URL)
        time.sleep(2)
        
        # 爬取第一页
        page1_data = extract_news_from_page(driver, page_num=1)
        all_new_data.extend(page1_data)
        
        # 获取总页数
        total_pages = get_pagination_info(driver)
        print(f"\n📊 预计总页数：{total_pages}")
        
        # 爬取剩余页面
        for page_num in range(2, total_pages + 1):
            print(f"\n📝 准备爬取第 {page_num} 页")
            
            if not click_next_page(driver, page_num - 1):
                print(f"❌ 无法翻到第 {page_num} 页，停止爬取")
                break
            
            # 等待页面加载
            time.sleep(2)
            WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
                EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CLASS_NAME, "blue-light"))
            )
            
            # 提取当前页数据
            page_data = extract_news_from_page(driver, page_num=page_num)
            all_new_data.extend(page_data)
            
            # 如果没有新数据，可以提前结束
            if len(page_data) == 0:
                print(f"⚠️ 第{page_num}页无新数据，可能已到达最后一页")
                break
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ 爬取过程出错：{e}")
    
    finally:
        driver.quit()
    
    return all_new_data

def save_to_jsonl(new_data):
    """保存数据到JSONL文件"""
    # 读取历史数据
    history_data = []
    if os.path.exists(JSONL_FILE):
        try:
            with open(JSONL_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                history_data = [json.loads(line.strip()) for line in f if line.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ 读取历史数据失败：{e}，将覆盖原有文件")
            history_data = []
    
    # 合并数据并去重
    all_data = history_data + new_data
    unique_data = []
    unique_titles = set()
    for item in all_data:
        if item["title"] not in unique_titles:
            unique_titles.add(item["title"])
            unique_data.append(item)
    
    # 按ID排序
    unique_data.sort(key=lambda x: x["id"])
    
    # 写入文件
    try:
        with open(JSONL_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            for item in unique_data:
                json_line = json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.write(json_line + "\n")
        
        print(f"\n📄 JSONL文件保存成功！")
        print(f"📁 文件路径：{os.path.abspath(JSONL_FILE)}")
        if unique_data:
            print(f"📈 总计数据：{len(unique_data)} 条（ID范围：1~{unique_data[-1]['id']}）")
        print(f"🔍 本次新增：{len(new_data)} 条不重复数据")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n❌ 保存失败：{str(e)}")

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
快速更新所有 news_record 的 category 为"人社部热点资讯"
"""

import sys
from pathlib import Path

# 添加项目根目录
current_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
app_dir = current_dir.parent
project_root = app_dir.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

# 加载环境变量
from dotenv import load_dotenv
env_path = project_root / '.env'
if env_path.exists():
    load_dotenv(env_path)

# 导入数据库模块
from app.utils.db import supabase_request

NEW_CATEGORY = "人社部热点资讯"

print("="*60)
print("批量更新 news_record 的 category")
print("="*60)

try:
    # 获取所有记录
    print("📊 正在查询现有记录...")
    result = supabase_request(
        method="GET",
        endpoint="/rest/v1/news_record",
        params={"select": "id"}
    )
    
    if not result:
        print("❌ 没有找到记录")
        sys.exit(1)
    
    print(f"✅ 找到 {len(result)} 条记录")
    
    # 批量更新
    print("🔄 正在批量更新...")
    success_count = 0
    
    for record in result:
        try:
            supabase_request(
                method="PATCH",
                endpoint="/rest/v1/news_record",
                params={"id": f"eq.{record['id']}"},
                json_data={"category": NEW_CATEGORY}
            )
            success_count += 1
            if success_count % 10 == 0:
                print(f"  已更新 {success_count}/{len(result)} 条...")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  ❌ 更新 ID {record['id']} 失败: {e}")
    
    print(f"\n✅ 更新完成！成功: {success_count}/{len(result)} 条")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ 操作失败: {e}")
